name: Mercat des Peix
description: Mahón's former fish market reborn as a food hall with local soul: fresh fish and seafood, tapas, sandwiches, and island beers and wines. A capital institution near the harbour, ideal for a relaxed bite.

highlights: grazing on fresh fish and shellfish in tapas form
Maó's old fish market (1927), now reborn
the food evenings with music at the market (Fri-Sun)
